dashboard.browseDescription: Jump back into the catalog views when you need more detail.
dashboard.createDescription: Add the core catalog records from one place.
dashboard.loadFailure: Dashboard data could not be loaded.
dashboard.subtitle: A quick overview of stores, offices, and products in your catalog.
dashboard.title: Dashboard

about.dataDescription: Stores contain offices, and products can be linked to the offices where they are available.

about.purposeDescription: Pricoteka keeps a practical catalog of stores, offices, and products so availability can be tracked without spreadsheets.
about.releaseDescription: The 1.0 release focuses on a stable data shape, clear navigation, and a clean foundation for future price tracking.
about.storageApi: This build is connected to the Pricoteka API. Data is shared through the backend service.
about.storageBrowser: This build stores data in this browser. It is useful for local use and quick cataloging.
about.subtitle: A lightweight catalog for tracking products across stores and offices.
about.title: About Pricoteka

settings.apiModeDescription: Reads and writes data through the backend service.
settings.apiUrlMissing: API URL is not configured. Set it here before using API mode.
settings.browserModeDescription: Stores data locally in this browser.
settings.description: Choose how Pricoteka reads and writes catalog data.
settings.title: Settings

products.noOfficesDescription: This store has no offices yet.
products.title: Products

stores.createOfficeDescription: Create a new office for this store.
stores.detailNoOfficesDescription: Create a new office to get started.
stores.emptyDescription: Create a new store to get started.
stores.title: Stores
